items.title: Patient Journey API exposes gate labels and detail metadata
items.precondition: Patient Journey service tests run after API label and metadata changes
items.expected: The service contract tests pass and TypeScript accepts GSC, Rybbit, and lead metadata
items.evidence: npm test -- patient-journey.service.test.ts passed with 12 tests. npx tsc --noEmit passed.

items.title: Growth gate surface replaces old funnel/drop-off copy
steps: 1. Search edited Patient Journey frontend/backend files for old visible labels
items.expected: Old visible copy is gone and frontend build passes
items.evidence: rg found no remaining matches for Searching your market, Saw your listing, Visited your site, Reached out, biggest drop-off, Fix the biggest leak, or Source details in the edited Patient Journey surface. Frontend build passed.
items.notes: The backend no longer returns the old stage labels either. Browser route check reached the sign-in screen in the current local browser session, so no authenticated screenshot was taken.

items.title: Simplified modals render measured summary, optional insights, and footer
items.precondition: Modal helper and card component compile
items.expected: Modal helper compiles without any or raw fetch violations
items.evidence: npm --prefix frontend run build passed. npm run check:conventions -- --strict passed with zero clear structural violations.
items.notes: Later revisions removed the unavailable lead page/source fields from the modal.

items.title: Docs parity checked
steps: 2. Search alloro-docs for Patient Journey and old funnel wording
items.expected: Docs are updated if an active Patient Journey docs page exists
items.evidence: alloro-docs working tree is clean. Search found no active Patient Journey docs page; only historical plan/changelog references and Website-page docs.

items.title: Search Opportunity modal shows top tracked keywords
items.precondition: Market summary, Patient Journey metadata, and modal helper updated
items.expected: Top approved tracked keywords are aggregated with search-volume numbers and the Search Opportunity modal uses that list
items.evidence: Targeted tests passed: 2 files, 14 tests. TypeScript passed. Frontend build passed. Strict convention checks passed with zero clear structural violations.
items.notes: Top keyword rows aggregate duplicate normalized keywords across locations and show up to 10 keywords sorted by estimated monthly volume.

items.title: Search Opportunity modal is a decluttered keyword expansion
items.precondition: Search Opportunity top keyword metadata and detail card renderer are already wired
items.expected: Search Opportunity detail keeps the estimate and tracked keyword count, removes confidence/cluster/primary-market/recommendation sections, and shows the top tracked keyword rows with volume numbers
items.evidence: Targeted tests passed: 2 files, 14 tests. TypeScript passed. Frontend build passed. Strict convention checks passed with zero clear structural violations. git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks passed.
items.notes: The recommendation section still renders for other growth gates; Search Opportunity now omits it so the keyword list takes the full detail area.

items.title: Modal scroll lives inside the card and keyword values read as estimates
items.precondition: Patient Journey detail modal files changed
steps: 5. Run git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks
items.expected: The detail wrapper no longer owns the scrollbar, the white modal card has a custom thin scrollbar, and Search Opportunity keyword values are labeled as monthly estimates
items.evidence: Targeted tests passed: 2 files, 14 tests. TypeScript passed. Frontend build passed. Strict convention checks passed with zero clear structural violations. git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks passed.
items.notes: Search Opportunity row values now display as estimated monthly values, and the footer clarifies they are rounded search-volume estimates, not exact people counts.

items.title: Detail card scrolls without a visible scrollbar
items.precondition: Patient Journey detail card owns modal scrolling
steps: 5. Run git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks
items.expected: The detail card remains scrollable while the visual scrollbar is hidden, preserving the rounded right edge
items.evidence: Targeted tests passed: 2 files, 14 tests. TypeScript passed. Frontend build passed. Strict convention checks passed with zero clear structural violations. git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks passed.
items.notes: The card keeps overflow-y-auto for scrolling, with browser-specific scrollbar hiding classes for Firefox, Chromium/Safari, and old Edge.

items.title: Remaining modals show only clear card-relevant facts
items.precondition: Google Visibility, Website Visitors, and Website Leads modal content was simplified
steps: 5. Run git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks
items.expected: The remaining modals remove noisy recommendations, unavailable fields, and technical metrics while keeping source-backed facts
items.evidence: Targeted tests passed: 2 files, 14 tests. TypeScript passed. Frontend build passed. Strict convention checks passed with zero clear structural violations. git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks passed.
items.notes: Google Visibility now keeps the main header value, top Google searches, and source footer. Website Visitors keeps visitors, sessions, average visit length, and page views. Website Leads keeps leads and visitor-to-lead rate.

items.title: Google Visibility modal removes duplicate summary cards
items.precondition: Google Visibility detail content and shared detail renderer were updated
steps: 5. Run git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks
items.expected: Google Visibility detail shows the main header value, description, top Google searches, and source footer without the summary metric-card grid
items.evidence: Targeted tests passed: 2 files, 14 tests. TypeScript passed. Frontend build passed. Strict convention checks passed with zero clear structural violations. git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks passed.
items.notes: The shared detail card now renders the summary grid only when a stage provides summary rows. Google Visibility intentionally provides none.

items.title: Metric cards include animated help tooltips
items.precondition: Metric card renderer and metric tooltip copy were added
steps: 5. Run git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks
items.expected: Displayed metric cards show a circle-question help icon with short hover/focus tooltip copy, including visitors versus sessions and why Google clicks may not equal recorded visitors
items.evidence: Targeted tests passed: 2 files, 14 tests. TypeScript passed. Frontend build passed. Strict convention checks passed with zero clear structural violations. git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks passed.
items.notes: The help icon is keyboard-focusable and uses an animated tooltip on hover or focus.

items.title: Growth Opportunity section is removed
items.precondition: Patient Journey dashboard section removal and padding change were applied
steps: 1. Search Patient Journey frontend files for the removed action section strings
6. Run git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks
items.expected: The standalone Growth Opportunity action card no longer renders, its unused component file is removed, and the dashboard bottom padding is reduced
items.evidence: rg found no remaining PatientJourneyAction, Review improvements, This month growth opportunity, or growth opportunity matches in the Patient Journey frontend files. Targeted tests passed: 2 files, 14 tests. TypeScript passed. Frontend build passed. Strict convention checks passed with zero clear structural violations. git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks passed.
items.notes: Dashboard bottom padding changed from pb-32 to pb-14.

items.title: Search-to-visibility arrow explains source mismatch
items.precondition: The first growth-gate arrow has help text wired from the Patient Journey helpers
steps: 5. Run git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks
items.expected: The Search Opportunity to Google Visibility connector shows a circle-question help icon and explains that the two cards use different sources and units
items.evidence: Targeted tests passed: 2 files, 14 tests. TypeScript passed. Frontend build passed. Strict convention checks passed with zero clear structural violations. git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks passed.
items.notes: The tooltip says Search Opportunity is a rounded estimate for tracked service keywords, while Google Visibility is Search Console impressions across more queries, including repeated appearances.

items.title: First arrow tooltip is shorter and opens upward
items.precondition: Tooltip copy, placement, and pipeline row spacing were updated
steps: 5. Run git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks
items.expected: The Search Opportunity to Google Visibility tooltip is concise, opens above the icon, and has enough top room to avoid clipping
items.evidence: Targeted tests passed: 2 files, 14 tests. TypeScript passed. Frontend build passed. Strict convention checks passed with zero clear structural violations. git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks passed.
items.notes: Tooltip width was reduced, copy shortened, placement changed from top-6 to bottom-6, and the pipeline row top padding changed from pt-5 to pt-10.

items.title: First arrow tooltip no longer clips at the top edge
items.precondition: The first-arrow tooltip copy, shape, and pipeline top-safe spacing were updated after user QA showed clipping remained
steps: 5. Run git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks
items.expected: The Search Opportunity to Google Visibility tooltip is compact and has enough top-safe area to open without clipping
items.evidence: Targeted tests passed: 2 files, 14 tests. TypeScript passed. Frontend build passed. Strict convention checks passed with zero clear structural violations. git diff --check and direct trailing-whitespace checks passed.
items.notes: Tooltip copy was shortened to a compact two-sentence explanation, the popover was changed to a pill, and the pipeline row top padding changed from pt-10 to pt-16.
